event: Deposited USDC into Aave V2 before building the CRV debt position
market_health_signal: Large stablecoin collateral funded a borrow-and-sell campaign in an illiquid lending market

event: Borrowed CRV in increments and sold through 1inch and centralized exchanges
market_health_signal: Borrowed supply repeatedly left Aave and coincided with a 33 percent spot drawdown

event: Supplied part of a 41M CRV collateral addition to Aave
market_health_signal: Large opposing collateral concentration made the market reflexive around one visible borrower

event: Added about 24M USDC collateral borrowed 55M CRV and transferred 30M CRV to centralized exchanges
market_health_signal: Borrow capacity scaled while spot liquidity and borrowable CRV depth were stressed

event: CRV reached the local low cited by Aave governance
market_health_signal: Oracle-priced debt became vulnerable to a sharp rebound after the sell pressure

event: First liquidation of the short account started
market_health_signal: Forced buybacks liquidated USDC collateral into a thin CRV market

event: EigenPhi-cited liquidation burst during the CRV rebound
market_health_signal: Liquidation flow arrived in an eight-minute window after a 50 percent intraday rebound

event: Position was liquidated but left excess CRV debt of about 2.64M CRV
market_health_signal: Liquidation design converted market manipulation into protocol bad debt

event: AIP-144 repayment contract acquired 2.7M CRV and cleared remaining excess debt
market_health_signal: Bad debt required a later governance-mediated treasury repayment rather than same-day market settlement
